function.name: task_clear
function.description: Clear the task queue. Two modes — soft (default) flips pending|claimed|in_progress|review|blocked to 'cancelled' (done/cancelled tasks preserved, rows + audit trail intact); hard (pass {"yes":true}) DELETES EVERY task row + EVERY task_event row from the table (full wipe — done, cancelled, pending, all gone, audit trail gone, cannot be undone). In both modes, team_state (goal) is NOT modified — use /team clear for that. Soft is idempotent. For a true wipe of everything in team.db (incl. team_state), use `rm -f .data/team.db`.

yes.description: If true, perform a HARD full-wipe (delete ALL task rows + ALL task_events). Default false = soft cancel (flip pending/claimed/.../blocked status to 'cancelled'; done and cancelled tasks untouched).
